subcommands.name: ng new
subcommands.description: Creates a new Angular workspace and initial application.

options.name: <name>
options.description: The name of the new workspace and initial project

options.name: --standalone
options.description: Create an application based on standalone APIs (default: true)

options.name: --routing
options.description: Enable routing for the initial project

options.name: --style
options.description: Style preprocessor: css, scss, sass, less

options.name: --skip-git
options.description: Do not initialize a git repository

options.name: --ssr
options.description: Enable server-side rendering and static site generation

options.name: --strict
options.description: Enable stricter type checking and bundle budgets

options.name: --inline-style
options.description: Include styles inline in the component TS file

options.name: --inline-template
options.description: Include template inline in the component TS file

options.name: --package-manager
options.description: Package manager to use: npm, yarn, pnpm, cnpm

subcommands.name: ng generate component
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular component.

options.name: --change-detection
options.description: Change detection strategy: Default or OnPush

options.name: --flat
options.description: Create at the top level of the project

options.name: --view-encapsulation
options.description: View encapsulation strategy: Emulated, None, ShadowDom

options.name: --style
options.description: Style file extension: css, scss, sass, less

subcommands.name: ng generate service
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular service.

options.name: --flat
options.description: Create at the top level of the project

subcommands.name: ng generate module
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular NgModule.

options.name: --flat
options.description: Create at the top level of the project

subcommands.name: ng generate directive
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular directive.

subcommands.name: ng generate pipe
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular pipe.

subcommands.name: ng generate guard
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular route guard.

options.name: --implements
options.description: Guard interfaces: CanActivate, CanDeactivate, CanActivateChild, CanMatch

subcommands.name: ng generate interceptor
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular HTTP interceptor.

subcommands.name: ng generate resolver
subcommands.description: Generates a new Angular route resolver.

subcommands.name: ng generate interface
subcommands.description: Generates a new TypeScript interface.

subcommands.name: ng generate enum
subcommands.description: Generates a new TypeScript enum.

subcommands.name: ng generate class
subcommands.description: Generates a new TypeScript class.

subcommands.name: ng generate library
subcommands.description: Generates a new library project in the workspace.

subcommands.name: ng generate application
subcommands.description: Generates a new application project in the workspace.

subcommands.name: ng serve
subcommands.description: Builds and serves the application with live reload on file changes.

options.name: --open
options.description: Open the URL in the default browser

subcommands.name: ng build
subcommands.description: Compiles the application into an output directory.

options.name: --aot
options.description: Build using Ahead of Time compilation (default: true)

subcommands.name: ng test
subcommands.description: Runs unit tests using Karma test runner.

subcommands.name: ng e2e
subcommands.description: Runs end-to-end tests. Requires an e2e package to be installed.

subcommands.name: ng lint
subcommands.description: Runs linting tools on Angular application code.

options.name: --force
options.description: Succeed even if lint errors exist

subcommands.name: ng add
subcommands.description: Adds support for an external library to the project.

options.name: --defaults
options.description: Disable interactive prompts and use defaults

subcommands.name: ng update
subcommands.description: Updates the application and its dependencies.

options.name: --migrate-only
options.description: Only perform migrations, not package updates

options.name: --allow-dirty
options.description: Allow updating when the repository has modified or untracked files

subcommands.name: ng deploy
subcommands.description: Invokes the deploy builder for the project.

subcommands.name: ng analytics
subcommands.description: Configures the collection of Angular CLI usage metrics.

subcommands.name: ng config
subcommands.description: Retrieves or sets Angular CLI configuration values.

options.name: <jsonPath>
options.description: Configuration key in JSON path format

options.name: <value>
options.description: New value for the given key

subcommands.name: ng doc
subcommands.description: Opens the official Angular documentation in a browser.

options.name: <keyword>
options.description: Keyword to search for in documentation

subcommands.name: ng extract-i18n
subcommands.description: Extracts i18n messages from source code.

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Path where output will be placed

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: xlf, xlf2, xmb, json, arb

subcommands.name: ng run
subcommands.description: Runs an Architect target with an optional custom builder configuration.

subcommands.name: ng cache
subcommands.description: Configure and manage the Angular CLI disk cache.

subcommands.name: npm run start
subcommands.description: Starts the Angular development server (alias for ng serve).

subcommands.name: npm run build
subcommands.description: Builds the Angular application for production.

subcommands.name: npm run test
subcommands.description: Runs the unit test suite.

subcommands.name: npm run lint
subcommands.description: Runs the linter on the project.

subcommands.name: npx ng
subcommands.description: Runs the Angular CLI directly without global installation.
